zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir John II Harington of Farleton於1300年出生在英國英格蘭藍卡爾法爾頓時，他的父親Sir John I Harington of Aldingham20歲，母親Margaret de Burlingham15歲。他和Katherine Banastre至少有3個兒子。他去世於1359年8月1日在英國英格蘭藍卡爾宏比 卡素享年59歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭藍卡爾蘭卡斯特。

nameMeanings.name: Harington
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Harrington
meanings: English: habitational name from any of the three places called Harrington (Cumberland, Lincolnshire, Northamptonshire). The Cumberland placename derives from the Old English personal name Hæfer + Old English connective -ing- + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’. The Lincolnshire placename derives from the Old English personal name Hearra + Old English connective -ing- + tūn. The Northamptonshire derives from an Old English personal name Hǣthhere + Old English connective -ing- + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’. Compare Herendeen .
Irish: adopted as an Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó hArrachtáin ‘descendant of Arrachtán’, a personal name from a diminutive of arrachtach ‘mighty, powerful’.
Irish: in Kerry, this name was adopted as an Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó hIongardail, later Ó hUrdáil, ‘descendant of Iongardal’, a personal name of uncertain origin.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

nameMeanings.name: II
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of   Violet  ,   Vivien  , or   Vivian .

variants.name: Vivien
meanings: Earlier generally taken as a variant of the boy's name Vivian , but now also rarely used for boys. This spelling was quite common in Old French. Its use as a girl's name in the English-speaking world was influenced by Tennyson's Merlin and Vivien ( 1859 ). This name, from Arthurian legend, may represent an altered form of a Celtic name (perhaps akin to the Irish Gaelic name Béibhinn ‘white lady’, pronounced ‘bee-veen’). The actress Vivien Leigh ( 1913–67 ) was christened Vivian.

variants.name: Violet
meanings: From the name of the flower (Old French violette, Late Latin violetta, a diminutive of viola). This was one of the earliest flower names to become popular in Britain, being used as early as 1700 and becoming well established in the 19th century, although it is now somewhat out of favour.

variants.name: Vivian
meanings: Originally a boy's name, from an Old French form of the Latin name Vivianus (probably a derivative of vivus ‘alive’), but now more frequent as a girl's name. The name was borne by a 5th-century bishop of Saintes in western France, remembered for protecting his people during the invasion of the Visigoths.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir John II Harington of Farleton was born in 1300, in Farleton, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Sir John I Harington of Aldingham, was 20 and his mother, Margaret de Burlingham, was 15. He had at least 3 sons with Katherine Banastre. He died on 1 August 1359, in Hornby Castle, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 59, and was buried in Lancaster, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir John II Harington of Farleton est né en 1300, à Farleton, Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir John I Harington of Aldingham, avait 20 ans et sa mère, Margaret de Burlingham, avait 15 ans. Il a eu au moins 3 fils avec Katherine Banastre. Il est décédé le 1 août 1359, à Hornby Castle, Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 59 ans, et a été enterré à Lancaster, Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

Er hatte mit Katherine Banastre mindestens 3 Söhne. Er starb am 1. ja.lifeSummary: Sir John II Harington of Farletonが1300年にイギリスイギリスランカシュアイアファルレトンで生まれた時，父Sir John I Harington of Aldinghamは20歳，母Margaret de Burlinghamは15歳であった。彼はKatherine Banastreとの間に少なくとも3人の息子をもうけた。彼は1359年8月1日にイギリスイギリスランカシュアイアホールンビー カストルで59歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスランカシュアイアランカスターにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir John II Harington of Farleton(이)가 1300년 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 패를레턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir John I Harington of Aldingham(은)는 20세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret de Burlingham(은)는 15세였다. 그는 Katherine Banastre(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1359년 8월 1일 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 호른비 카스틀에서 59세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 랭커스터에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir John II Harington of Farleton родился в 1300 г. в местности фарлетон, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir John I Harington of Aldingham было 20 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret de Burlingham, 15. У него было по крайней мере 3 сына от Katherine Banastre. Он умер 1 августа 1359 г. в местности хаурнби кастл, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 59 лет и был похоронен в местности ланкастир, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания.
